use_cases: Animate hero section taglines with a randomized character scramble reveal effect
Create engaging loading states with text that scrambles before displaying final content
Cycle through multiple phrases in rotation with smooth character-by-character transitions
Add visual interest to dashboard headers with animated rotating messages
Build attention-grabbing call-to-action text with typewriter-style reveal
ai_summary: A lightweight text animation component that creates a scramble effect by cycling through random characters before revealing the final phrase. Supports multiple phrases in sequence with configurable timing, looping behavior, and CSS class customization. Ideal for hero sections, loading states, or dynamic text displays where animated transitions add visual polish.
